summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Shadow Cakes Pricing Tool MVP. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working perfectly with 100% success rate.

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby attributes for accessibility

passed_tests: Dashboard loads with stats cards for all entities
Navigation sidebar functionality across all pages
Settings page - view and update labour/utility rates
Ingredients page - add ingredients manually and add pricing
Packaging page - add packaging items with cost
Components page - create component recipes with ingredients
Recipes page - create recipes with variants
Recipe detail page - add ingredients to variants
Recipe detail page - cost breakdown calculation
Recipe detail page - selling price and margin calculation
All CRUD operations for ingredients, packaging, components, recipes
Cost calculation engine with labour/utility rates
